label: Community Garden Coordinator
service_summary: Handle plot access, waitlist questions, and tool-shed scheduling issues.
brand_voice: Friendly, organized, and community-minded. Keep the tone grounded and practical.
escalation_path: Escalate shared-plot disputes to the volunteer board coordinator.

required_policy_points.description: Tool-shed bookings open 48 hours before the time slot.
Waitlist changes are confirmed during the weekly coordinator review.
Shared-plot disputes go to the volunteer board coordinator.
